specific_mechanism: BRUN-SIFT-PRUNE: K-criterion joint sift via truncated inclusion-exclusion to level r + provable error bound + complement-set pruning
llm_application: Per token, compute K independent importance-criterion scores from K attention heads; apply a truncated alternating-sum formula (inclusion-exclusion bounded at level r) to estimate the joint-satisfaction count with explicit error term; prune tokens outside the bounded important-set.
novelty_claim: GBLM-Pruner and LLM-Sieve are single-criterion thresholding; truncated inclusion-exclusion is JOINT multi-criterion.
